frozen_reason: Pre-committed before L_dsl_synthesis Step 3 training dispatch. Acceptance gate (executable_accuracy >= 0.50) is fixed by L_dsl_synthesis Step 4 of the lane spec and must not move after adapter output is inspected.

dataset_boundary.holdout_unseen_rule: Holdout file was generated by scripts/dsl/synthesize_triples.py with --split=holdout from disjoint sample meta. No row from the holdout file is present in any train_files entry of the v1 profile.

perplexity.description: Standard NLL over assistant turn (the program text). Cheap and comparable to other coding-agent lanes. Reported but not gating.

executable_accuracy.description: Percent of predicted programs that, when parsed by python.scbe.dsl.primitives.parse_program and run by run_program against the initial state derived from meta, produce a final GridState whose .well field equals the expected well in meta. For tasks with explicit dst tongue, .tongue must also equal meta.dst (or meta.tongue / meta.listener_tongue per task type).
executable_accuracy.computation: Use python/scbe/dsl/primitives.py parse_program + run_program. Initial state derived per scripts/dsl/synthesize_triples.py _shape_for(meta). Match on (final.well, final.tongue) tuple per meta.task contract.
executable_accuracy.gate_reason: Lane spec Step 4: 'Acceptance gate: executable accuracy >= 50% on holdout.'

must_pass_categories.description: Per-task-type executable_accuracy must clear a category-level floor so the gate is not satisfied by overfitting one task. Floors are intentionally below the overall 0.50 gate to allow non-uniform learning while preventing single-category collapse.

failure_modes.counts_as_failure: Predicted assistant turn does not parse via parse_program (unknown primitive, malformed line, or empty program). The expected line in target answer is treated as the contract; trailing comment lines starting with # are ignored when scoring.

Program parses and runs but final.well does not match meta-derived expected well token (TRANSLATED, TRANSLATED_ALL, IDENTIFIED, EDIT_BODY, EDIT_ALL_INIT, ALIGNED, GOVERNANCE, MULTILINE, SEALED, etc.).
Program runs but final.tongue does not match meta dst/tongue/listener_tongue when the task type contractually requires a specific tongue.

Program emits a primitive name outside the canonical 8-primitive set. Any unknown primitive name is a hard fail (mirrors lexicon_dimension_report.py drift gate behavior at training-time data, applied here at eval-time output).

Predicted program length exceeds DEPTH=3 from scripts/dsl/synthesize_triples.py without producing a well-formed terminal state. Programs with length > 3 are scored only if final state is correct; otherwise classified as failure for diagnostics.

regression_guard.rule: v1 dsl-synthesis adapter must continue to satisfy the Stage 6 frozen contract (pass_rate >= 0.8 with all must_pass prompts passing). If the Stage 6 contract regresses, halt promotion regardless of dsl executable_accuracy.

decision_rule: Adapter passes the dsl-synthesis lane only if executable_accuracy >= 0.50 on the full holdout AND every category in must_pass_categories.floors clears its floor AND the Stage 6 regression_guard contract still passes.
